parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'project_id', p.id::text,
  'project_name', p.name,
  'project_type', p.project_type,
  'property_area_m2', p.property_area_m2,
  'location_address', p.location_address,
  'location_city', p.location_city,
  'location_province', p.location_province,
  'design_option', (SELECT json_build_object('title', d.title, 'rooms_layout', d.rooms_layout) FROM design_options d WHERE d.project_id = p.id AND d.is_selected = true LIMIT 1),
  'briefing', (SELECT json_build_object('rooms_affected', b.rooms_affected) FROM briefings b WHERE b.project_id = p.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 1),
  'materials', (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('category', m.category, 'name', m.name, 'specification', m.specification, 'room', m.room)) FROM materials m WHERE m.project_id = p.id AND m.status != 'rejected')
) AS data
FROM projects p WHERE p.id = $1::uuid;

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: item, binary: { data: { data: Buffer.from(item.content, 'utf8').toString('base64'), mimeType: 'text/plain', fileName: item.filename } } }];

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Build IFC').first().json.project_id, ('spaces=' + $('Build IFC').first().json.spaces_count + ', materials=' + $('Build IFC').first().json.materials_count + ', bytes=' + $('Build IFC').first().json.bytes) ] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({status:'exported', filename: $('Build IFC').first().json.filename, bytes: $('Build IFC').first().json.bytes, spaces_count: $('Build IFC').first().json.spaces_count, materials_count: $('Build IFC').first().json.materials_count, drive_file_id: ($('Upload to Drive').first()?.json?.id || null), drive_url: ($('Upload to Drive').first()?.json?.webViewLink || null), note: 'IFC4 stub minimalista (project+site+building+storey+spaces+materials). NO incluye geometria. Sirve para tracker en Revit/ArchiCAD.'}) }}
